# Serenity Hills

Serenity Hills is a premium Dapoli real estate project focused on verified NA plot opportunities, second-home possibilities, nature-led estate living, and guided buyer conversations.

Primary audience:
- Buyers from Pune and Mumbai
- NRIs interested in Dapoli property enquiries
- Families seeking second homes
- Buyers exploring land ownership in coastal Maharashtra
- Long-term lifestyle and investment-oriented buyers

Main pages:
- /
- /the-estate
- /plots-villas
- /villas
- /na-plots-in-dapoli
- /dream-villa
- /dapoli-tourism
- /about-us
- /contact
- /latest-events
- /privacy-policy
- /terms-and-conditions
- /policy-terms

Primary contact:
WhatsApp: +91 96995 49324

Important note:
Website information is for general project enquiry purposes. Buyers should conduct independent due diligence, review documentation, and seek professional advice before making property decisions.
